final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night 杭州 self-guided itinerary, with a real 杭州 map as the central spine and landmark-illustrated panels floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: needs a travel-attack-card / illustrated-brochure aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark icons floating with shadow above cardstock surface
Subject: must include all scenic spots, dining, and tips across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺；午餐：楼外楼（东坡肉＋龙井虾仁，人均150元）
  Day 2 (禅意杭州): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城；晚餐：素描餐厅（人均90元）
  Day 3 (九溪烟树徒步): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径；晚餐：茶人村（人均120元）
  Day 4 (文艺收官): 方案A — 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺；方案B — 西溪湿地 / 周家村 / 深潭口
Scene/backdrop: must be a real 杭州 map base with illustrated routes connecting all day-panels across the fold
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-guide atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh 江南 direction (greens, ink blues, warm paper tones) — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock surface with floating shadow beneath each landmark cutout
Text (verbatim): must include itinerary copy on each panel — verbatim content per day as follows:
  Day 1: "西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南" / 路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 / 午餐推荐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁），人均150元
  Day 2: "禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵" / 路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 / 晚餐推荐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡+焦糖布丁），人均90元
  Day 3: "九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人" / 路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 / 晚餐推荐：茶人村（私房桂鱼+香芋煲），人均120元
  Day 4: "文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面" / 方案A：拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 / 方案B：西溪湿地→周家村→深潭口 / 伴手礼：南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒）、万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州 map; all 4 day-panels must be visible in the tri-fold; all 景点 names preserved; landmark icons must have distinct 地标 character per spot; floating-on-cardstock effect must be visible
Avoid: generic tourist-map clip art; flat non-illustrated style; losing any day-panel content
